description: Animated metaballs using smooth union of spheres for organic, blobby shapes that merge and separate.
example_prompts: create melting blob metaballs using smooth union of animated spheres
compose organic gooey shapes that merge and separate over time
build animated metaball scene with smooth blending radius 0.8

screenshot_metadata.notes: Animate sphere positions with sin/cos. Use smooth union k=0.8. Add subsurface-style coloring.
